paragraphs.text: 春天的风暖暖的，最适合放风筝了。爸爸给我买了一个蝴蝶形状的风筝。
paragraphs.translation: The spring wind is warm and perfect for flying kites. Dad bought me a butterfly-shaped kite.

paragraphs.text: 我举着风筝跑啊跑，风筝慢慢升起来了。风筝越飞越高，在天空中自由飞翔。
paragraphs.translation: I held the kite and ran and ran. The kite slowly rose up. Higher and higher, flying freely in the sky.

paragraphs.text: 风筝线差点断了，我赶紧收线。放风筝真开心，下次我还要来！
paragraphs.translation: The kite string almost broke; I quickly reeled it in. Flying kites is so fun, I want to come again next time!
